horoscope: With today’s impulsive Mars-Uranus square, dear Aries, avoid reacting too quickly or loudly if you’re frustrated. Money matters or uncertainties can certainly complicate relationship dynamics, and you’re not in any mood to feel tied down. It’s important to be mindful if you want to free yourself of something that has held you back, however, as there is a real tendency to be hasty today. A healthy outlet can be to focus on areas of your life that you may have been avoiding and sideline the things you’ve been overdoing. A much more balanced feeling may result. There has been a stronger focus on your social life and happiness goals or long-term plans and dreams, which has bumped some of your practical goals down to second place. The results of this may make themselves known today, but don’t let the disruption get you down. Instead, take this opportunity to see your practical affairs from a new perspective, as it may lead to new possibilities. You may be taking action on a matter that feels long overdue today. Today’s transits are especially good for looking at your life in new ways, especially private, personal, self-worth, and financial matters.

Today's Mars-Uranus square involves your sign, dear Taurus, and it can produce some tension. If you feel restricted by something or someone, the instinct may be to rock the boat, but do keep in mind that you'll be far more effective if you take the time for some self-knowledge. Knowing what it is you genuinely want makes any rebellion or reaction more effective. While you've been excited about pursuing your goals with Mars at the top of your solar chart, if you've been overdoing this or pressuring yourself to succeed, you're likely to need a break that refreshes now. If schedules are interrupted, it can be a positive, since the changes you make may lead you to a better place. Doing your own thing can be good for you, but avoid making a splash as you do. Focus on goals that make you feel happy and accomplished, rather than focusing on what others think is right for you. Fortunately, you’re in great form for hopes and dreams.

You may feel a desire to break out of your usual boundaries, dear Gemini, but a small part of you may not be willing to change. These contradictions are due to a Mars-Uranus square. Moodiness may interfere with achieving your goals or spreading your wings, for example. This can be due to inner restlessness or discomfort about a problem, and it's best to avoid impulsive actions and decisions, especially with Mercury retrograde as well. While you can be frustrated by an unrealized fantasy or dream, instead of rebelling or outright denying your need for change, think about healthy ways to explore and assert your freedom. Aim to learn more about yourself and your true desires. With some adjustments, you can find yourself in fine form for letting go of those things that have only served to weigh you down. Following the protocol and rules too closely may spell missed opportunities. Still, you shouldn’t have to force anything either, and as the day advances, you'll find your mood smoothing out nicely.

Today's Mars-Uranus square is tense and impatient, dear Cancer, but if you pull back from it, you'll see that it's prompting you to explore the need to make changes. It's important to feed yourself spiritual or emotional nourishment now, which can take the form of hope, humor, and warmth. Impulsivity and willfulness can be themes. A strong desire for change in your life can feel looming, but focusing on exactly what and how you want to change is the most challenging part! You may feel some confusion about whether you want distance or to jump in with both feet in your relationships. Although you have been feeling a need for more intensity lately, the parts of you that desire a healthy bit of distance can emerge now, which may lead to misunderstandings with others if you are not fully aware of why you are feeling this way. Look for ways to nurture the feelings of independence you are feeling, while also keeping yourself open to exploring your emotions. This is a week of feeling more empowered to make long-overdue changes, although you may need to do some battle with your feelings first.

You may experience people disagreeing with the way you approach your work or your goals today, dear Leo, as Mars forms a square to Uranus. Feelings of being ignored or not taken seriously may come to a head. You may discover later that you were not quite ready to jump into (or out of) something. It can also be a time when someone disagrees with your current goals or approach to your work. Alternatively, career fluctuations or frustrations can disrupt the flow now, and tensions are hard to ignore. Although you may feel you don’t know how to get closer to or better understand some people in your life, conflict can lead to new ways of understanding and working with them, leaving the relationship in a better place in the end. The key now is to identify what needs changing or improving so you can take action that adds value to your life. Avoid quick decisions, as you don't have all the information you need to draw conclusions. People you're dealing with can be hard to get close to, understand, or digest. Even so, through conflict or chaos with a partner, competitor, or higher-up, you may discover new approaches that work just as well, or better.

Due to an impulsive Mars-Uranus square today, dear Virgo, it may be best to take your time before making any important decisions. Health and work-related tensions may reach a boiling point after having expended much energy on these matters recently. Take today to give yourself a break from these goals so that you can act more spontaneously or explore your feelings more fully. Disruptions in your schedule may allow for just that, in fact! However, if you really want to get things done, when deciding on areas that need to change, avoid acting on a whim. Instead, channel your frustrations into making improvements. If there are tensions around working to a schedule or in a limiting, oppressive environment, you can feel this acutely now. If your methods have been too rigid, you’ll begin to see the value of making creative changes today. However, for the best results, once you see what needs to change, avoid an abrupt or all-or-nothing approach to making them. Later today, you'll feel far freer to unwind, and talking with someone special can be just the ticket.

Today is a day that pushes change and your life forward, dear Libra, as Mars and Uranus form a square. This influence has a way of pushing matters that need change. As excited as you may be about a creative project or exploring a romance or personal interest these days, you need a break from pushing too hard, and circumstances occurring now may force the issue! In fact, you may be limiting yourself by focusing too intensely on one project or train of thought. If you've been caged in, even if it's of your own making, you'll feel it strongly now, and change becomes necessary. Resisting change can lead to more complicated problems, as can rebellious actions. Make plans to enforce improvements rather than react too quickly. While a Mars-Uranus square can incline you to jump too quickly to conclusions, Mercury's aspects point to opportunities to learn. You can be filled with creative ideas.

You have more courage than usual to break down walls between yourself and others, dear Scorpio. You’re adding some extra spice to your home life. Still, today’s Mars-Uranus transit is somewhat rebellious. If something about your interactions feels stale, confining, or otherwise stunting your emotional growth, it's time for creative ways of relating. There can be a whole lot of concentrated energy, and a clash of values with someone may be part of the picture. An unexpected circumstance or a sudden change of attitude can jolt you out of your usual routine. Stronger desires and needs can become intense and in focus now, and it’s important to open yourself up to the need for change, but not to rush into anything just yet. While your close relationships and domestic world may have some surprises in store, staying flexible will be vital to navigating them gracefully.

Today’s Mars-Uranus square brings impulsive energy, dear Sagittarius, but finding ways of making the best or the most of a situation can make it quite manageable. Personal projects and interests can be compelling, but avoid letting your excitement for them lead to ignoring your other needs. Circumstances now may help you along if you have been overly preoccupied, as change is in the air. You may be feeling especially enterprising, but there is also a tendency to push something forward rashly, which can set you back. If current activities are interfering with your happiness and the order or structure in your life, you’ll recognize the need for more attention to your daily affairs now. Identify which parts of your life require more flexibility, and carefully consider how to achieve this, even if you feel pressure to find a quick solution. Don’t let impatience prevail, but recognize the need for constructive change. Having a little fun with life may very well lead to the most innovative and useful approaches. While a Mars-Uranus aspect colors the first half of the day with rather impulsive energy, as the day advances, it's easier to recognize the need for a plan or strategy. You're likely to envision ways of making the best or the most of a situation. You could also have an eye-opening conversation.

A Mars-Uranus square colors the first part of the day with some unpredictability or rebellion, dear Capricorn. However, some helpful transits ensure that you're learning something important from your realizations and even conflicts. Communicating and learning can be powerful ways to relax and unwind later today. Before then, you could feel the more erratic or disordered parts in your life more strongly, which can lead to tension and perhaps unexpected disruptions. Watch for stubbornness regarding sticking to what you know and doing things on your own. If you've been resistant to change, Uranus won't mind pushing you out of your comfort zone! It's better to anticipate what needs to change and be proactive about it. Tension can arise in areas of your life that have been preoccupying your mind, leading to feelings of restlessness. Alternatively, you may experience conflict with someone over issues of values or respect. Frustrations can come from an inner clash between wanting to take a risk and preferring to stay in your comfort zone. Take both sides into consideration as you move forward, and take steps forward rather than huge leaps for the best results now.

Distractions and disruptions can occur today as Mars clashes with Uranus, dear Aquarius. Mars is currently transiting your sign, and Uranus is your planetary ruler, so this feels personal! Issues may come to a head for you or for people around you, especially regarding matters that have remained stagnant and resistant to change. Keep an open mind to change, but don’t go all in by making rash, impatient decisions. Taking a brief break from areas of your life where you’ve been overly preoccupied can help restore a sense of order. Take time to release some of the tension that has been building up from feeling restricted or overruled recently, but do so constructively. Rather than rushing into situations, aim to express your needs in healthy ways and take the time to understand yourself for the best results. It’s a powerful time to discover new ways of expressing and enjoying yourself.

Today's Mars-Uranus aspect tends to bring problems to a head, dear Pisces, perhaps messily. However, a Mercury-Venus alignment coming into play later today can help you gain perspective and learn from these epiphanies or conflicts, which can lead to inspired ideas. Until then, a feeling of a need for change is present with Mars in your privacy sector in a tense aspect with Uranus. Areas of discontent in your life may be harder to fully identify now, leading to a generalized feeling of frustration that arises at random. These days, you may be feeling more independent and perhaps introverted, while also keeping an interest in being open to connections with others and communication. Be wary of putting too much energy into a single task or project, as it can backfire by disrupting other areas of your life. Try to seek a healthier balance by not over-focusing on one or two aspects of your life while ignoring others. Thankfully, later today, you are able to come up with interesting and successful solutions to inner conflicts.
